text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. We'll be
starting a more rigorous routine to further
improve performance.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You there! Hurry and take your bags to your
room!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You there! You'll have time to chat later! We
have the introductory speeches at the main
building soon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And you! Hurry to your roo—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That was dangerous! I almost made a mistake and
sent you to your room!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But of course!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Training camps are where class representatives
shine! We get to show off our skills such as
leadership, management, and keeping the peace!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, busy, busy! It's not easy being a model
student!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, I'm capable of handling both
flawlessl—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: AAAH! You over there! What are you up to?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Going to the beach is still off-limits! I won't let
you through without permission!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Erm... Okay. Then... may I go to the beach?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you asking me for permission?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You depend on me that much? In that case, I can
hardly refute such earnestness!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I permit it! Go ahead!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
HEY! What do think you're doing, Sakura
Bakushin O?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Teacher! Did you see that? My judgment was
incredible, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Feel free to call me Master Class Rep from now
on if you like!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: What in blazes are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins Sakura Bakushin O's passionate (?)
summer camp.
